channel.title: Notes on wolflytics
channel.description: Recent content in Notes on wolflytics

item.title: Why this notes section exists
item.description:
I kept treating every post like an essay, so when the PhD got busy the blog went quiet for months. This is the fix: a place for short, rough notes I can write in five minutes. A paper I read, a thought, something that surprised me. No pressure to be polished — that’s what the posts are for.

If a few notes start clustering around the same idea, that’s usually the seed of a real post.
